overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a nighttime Manhattan street. The scene features autumn foliage, streetlights, pedestrians, and passing taxis in a detailed urban environment with a mix of modern glass and historic brick architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with modern residential buildings

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk past various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in leather jacket and cap standing on the sidewalk
woman in purple jacket walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Contemporary apartment building with large glass windows and wooden accents
Tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with warm light
Black garbage bags piled next to a street pole
White commercial delivery truck parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a nighttime city sidewalk bordered by a modern glass residential building on the left and a street with parked cars on the right. The scene features autumn trees, street lighting, and moderate pedestrian traffic including a man in a leather jacket and a woman in purple.

events.description: Spider-Man steps from the sidewalk onto the crosswalk to cross the street
Yellow taxi cab drives past on the right while Spider-Man is crossing

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the street at a marked crosswalk, navigating between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving through the intersection
man in business suit waiting at the street corner

entered.detail: White striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
Traffic signal showing red light for pedestrians
Red brick building at the street corner with large windows
Bright yellow taxi cab with illuminated roof light

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses a city street at a crosswalk, transitioning from the modern glass building area to a brick building district. A yellow taxi passes by on the right while pedestrians wait at the corner, and the traffic light shows red.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and outdoor seating

events.description: Spider-Man steps back onto the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street
Spider-Man briefly slows to navigate around a group of pedestrians near a market

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking past storefronts and pedestrians sitting on outdoor benches

woman in gray sweater walking while talking on her phone

Outdoor seating bench in front of the storefront
Red and white striped awning with 'MARKET' signage
Red pickup truck parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a commercial sidewalk featuring brick buildings with storefronts, including a market with a red and white awning. Pedestrians sit on outdoor benches and walk along the path, while autumn trees line the street with parked cars visible on the right.

events.description: Spider-Man approaches and begins crossing another intersection
Spider-Man turns right at the corner to walk down a new street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the street and turning the corner onto a new block with fewer pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in black jacket standing near the corner
white delivery truck parked along the curb

entered.detail: White striped pedestrian crossing at the intersection
Ornate historic brick building with large arched windows and stone trim
Black fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crosses another street intersection and turns right onto a new block featuring historic brick architecture with ornate arched windows. The pedestrian density decreases as he walks past a parked delivery truck and a fire hydrant on the corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime Manhattan sidewalk that transitions from a modern glass district to a historic brick neighborhood. It begins by tracking Spider-Man as he walks past a sleek residential glass building, flanked by autumn trees and pedestrians including a man in a leather jacket and a woman in purple. As the camera continues forward, the scene shifts toward the street where parked cars line the curb under the glow of city lighting. The movement then carries Spider-Man across a crosswalk, passing a yellow taxi on the right while pedestrians wait at a red light. Finally, the environment opens up as the camera completes the crossing, leaving the modern architecture behind to enter a district characterized by brick buildings.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling commercial district that transitions into a quieter street lined with historic architecture. It begins by trailing Spider-Man along a lively sidewalk past brick storefronts and a market with a red and white awning, where pedestrians linger on outdoor benches beneath autumn trees. As he moves forward, the camera follows him across a street intersection, shifting the environment from the crowded market area toward a new block. The scene then opens up to reveal ornate arched windows and historic brick facades as the pedestrian density decreases. Finally, the camera glides past a parked delivery truck and a fire hydrant on the corner as he continues his walk.
